game: The Legend of Spyro: Dawn of the Dragon

0.0.1.description: The initial playable Archipelago client for The Legend of Spyro: Dawn of the Dragon (PS2, NTSC-U). Please see the [readme on the main repository page](https://github.com/IcyPenguin28/DotDAP) for additional information about known bugs and setup instructions.
0.0.1.title: ver. 0.0.1

0.0.2.description:
### Additions:
* **_Shuffle Chapter Order is now an option_**. Players will always start in Catacombs (in order to have the Chapter menu enabled at the start) and will always end in Malefor's Lair. When this option is enabled, the middle nine chapters may be unlocked out of order. Be warned that this may cause spikes in difficulty.
* Keys are now progressive and are now called _**Progressive Chapter Unlocks**_ instead of Keys.
### Changes:
* **_The randomizer must be played via chapter mode_**. This prevents loading into unplayable states via forced loads such as the cases with the Catacombs, Dragon City, and The Dam. 
### Fixes:
* Valley of Avalar Blue Gem Cluster 11/19 now properly triggers
* Progressive Chapter Unlocks placement logic has been updated to help prevent creating unwinnable seeds
### Known Bugs:
* Death Link does not do anything in-game when enabled as an option
0.0.2.title: ver. 0.0.2
